sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the execution of rundll32 with a command line that doesn't contain a .dll file
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Tim Shelton, Florian Roth, Yassine Oukessou (fix + fp)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects use of rundll32 as a LOLBAS binary where rundll32 is passed unexpected arguments such as a .iso instead of .dll (i.e. rundll32.exe test.iso, evilexport).
sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: LOLBAS rundll32 without expected arguments (via cmdline)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detect the creation of a service with a service binary located in a uncommon directory
Detects when attackers use "sc.exe" or the powershell "Set-Service" cmdlet to change the startup type of a service to "disabled"
sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Sc Or Set-Service Cmdlet Execution to Disable Services

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects a windows service to be stopped
Detects the creation of an executable by another executable
sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Creation of an Executable by an Executable

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects execution of Net.exe, whether suspicious or benign.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Michael Haag, Mark Woan (improvements), James Pemberton / @4A616D6573 / oscd.community (improvements)

packers.PEiD: UPX 2.90 [LZMA] -> Markus Oberhumer, Laszlo Molnar & John Reiser

attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386, for MS Windows, UPX compressed
